hero.title: Your personal chef, powered by AI
hero.subtitle: CocinIA generates recipes tailored to you, plans your week, and automatically builds your shopping list. Effortlessly.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need in your kitchen
features.subtitle: Four features designed to make your life in the kitchen easier, more varied, and better organized.

items.title: AI Recipes
items.description: Describe what you crave or the ingredients you have. CocinIA generates a complete recipe with steps, nutrition, and estimated cost in seconds.

items.title: Weekly Plan
items.description: Generate a complete meal plan for the whole week, tailored to your dietary preferences, kitchen equipment, and calorie goals.

items.title: Shopping List
items.description: CocinIA automatically extracts all ingredients from your recipes and weekly plan and organizes them into a ready-to-use list.

items.title: Personal Cookbook
items.description: Save, organize, and search all your generated recipes. Filter by meal type, difficulty, or prep time.

screenshots.label: The app
screenshots.title: Designed to be a joy to use

how.label: How it works
how.title: From idea to plate in minutes

steps.title: Tell us what you want
steps.description: Type what you are craving, what ingredients you have, or let AI surprise you with something new.

steps.title: AI generates your recipe
steps.description: In seconds you get a complete recipe with detailed steps, nutrition info, and estimated cost.

steps.title: Save and organize
steps.description: Add the recipe to your cookbook, send ingredients to your shopping list, and plan your week.

steps.title: Time to cook!
steps.description: Follow the steps in the app, check chef tips, and enjoy your meal.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Start free, scale whenever you want
pricing.subtitle: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: For people who want the full experience.

pricing.first_month: 🎉 First month free for new users

items.q: Does it work without an internet connection?
items.a: AI recipe generation requires an internet connection, but you can view your saved recipes and shopping list offline.
Yes. Your recipes, preferences, and profile data are private and never shared with third parties. You can delete your account at any time.
Yes, you can cancel at any time from your Google Play account settings. There are no long-term commitments or penalties.

items.q: What happens when I reach the free plan limit?
items.a: Generating new recipes is blocked until the next month. Your saved recipes and active plan remain accessible.

items.q: What languages is the app available in?
items.a: CocinIA is available in Spanish and English. The app automatically detects your device language.
The iOS version is in development. Join the waitlist and we will let you know as soon as it is available.

waitlist.subtitle: The iOS version is on the way. Be the first to know.
waitlist.note: No spam. We only email you when iOS is ready.
waitlist.success: You are in! We will notify you when iOS arrives.
